  • Changelog

Compiled nlmer sensitivity model (prediction + gradients)

Source: R/nlmerRxUiGet.R
rxUiGet.nlmerSensModel.Rd

Returns a list with:

  • thetaGrad: compiled rxode2 model computing rx_pred_ and rx__sens_rx_pred__BY_THETA_i___ for each estimated parameter. When eventSens = "jump" this model carries rxode2's analytic event-jump sensitivities (loaded/activated by nlmixr2est::.nlmSetupEnv()).

  • predOnly: compiled rxode2 model for prediction only

  • eventTheta: integer vector flagging THETA[i] that need Shi2021 finite differences for dosing parameters (all 0 under eventSens = "jump")

  • paramNames: character vector of parameter names in THETA[i] order

Usage

# S3 method for class 'nlmerSensModel'
rxUiGet(x, ...)

Arguments

x

rxUiGet list(ui)

...

additional arguments (currently ignored)

Details

The list follows the modelInfo contract of nlmixr2est::.nlmSetupEnv() so the nlm C machinery can load it once and keep it resident.

On this page
